Best Drop Spot
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2024 at 4:02 PM Rating: Decent
Deathwysh
4 posts
The Rat Pit in The Warrens.

My level 60 mage w/epic pet and aoe nukes could not keep up with the spawn rate. Got 100 ears in about 15 minutes.
▲ Page top
Great Drop Spot
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2023 at 9:00 AM Rating: Decent
araisfeld
Scholar
161 posts
They drop off the diseased rats near the entrance to Rivervale in Misty Thicket. Pretty quick repop time, too.
▲ Page top

# Jul 23 2021 at 2:43 AM Rating: Good

301 posts
patched recently for tlp servers but now it doesnt seem to be on live server merchies either. Hopefully this is an oversight and will be fixed.

storebought
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2021 at 11:00 AM Rating: Excellent
Cylius & Laurana
759 posts
Looks like it's intentional:

August 10, 2021 [Test Server- Patch Notes]
_____________________

*** Items ***

- Rat Ears have been removed from all merchants.

I'm not seeing rat ears on any merchant as of Aug 11 on standard servers. Looks like the upcoming patch for Aug 18, 2021 officially states their removal.

Scholar
273 posts
what recipes is this used in besides rat ear sandwich and gnomish spirits? If you tell me I will tell you where you can farm 60-100 of this in 30 minutes. HEHEHEH

I have a ton of these and need to know what recipe to use em in

PS> Farm them in the tutorial.
▲ Page top
Katha Firespinner
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2003 at 6:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247340732
11 posts
Katha Firespinner sells Rat Ears- she is at the inn right before you zone into the west commonlands. here is a lay out of the buildings- 
     WC   :   B C D  
     WC   : A       E


she is either at 'A' or 'E' I think most likely she is at E.

Edited, Thu Jul 17 19:47:46 2003

Vendors?
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2002 at 4:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570529546
24 posts
I just attempted to purchase rat ears from each of the vendors listed above (Agar and Dalgrim Underbelly). Neither of them had any for sale. Does anyone know of any vendor that sells them? Thanks.
▲ Page top
RE: Vendors?
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2003 at 11:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760262954
View User Forum
3 posts
Players will sell these items to merchants, who keep them until the player logs out, or sometimes for a bit of time after the player logs. The best way to get these is to auction request them or shout you will pay for stacks.
▲ Page top
RE: Vendors?
QuoteReply
# Sep 24 2004 at 3:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592264965213
27 posts
They keep them until sold, or until the server is rebooted; they don't poof when the PC that sold them logs off.
▲ Page top
RE: Vendors?
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2008 at 4:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592778397357
36 posts
Vendors lose all items they have that were sold to them by PCs if the zone is repopped, (repopulated), too.
▲ Page top
RE: Vendors?
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 3:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1696810595756
402 posts
They didn't sell them at all either when I looked!
